summary: Tested Video Testimonials feature on About page. All features working correctly: 3 video testimonial cards with thumbnails, play buttons, duration badges, project types, and location pins. Modal opens with 'Video Coming Soon' placeholder and client info. Video section correctly NOT present on homepage. Admin panel has Video Testimonial checkbox and fields.

elements_verified: Title 'What Our Clients Say in Motion' displayed
Subtitle 'Watch real stories from homeowners who transformed their living spaces with LEXA'
3 video testimonial cards in grid layout

features_verified: Client name in modal: Ahmed Al-Rashid
Client info: 'Villa Owner • Palm Jumeirah, Dubai'

no_video_testimonials_on_homepage.verification: Scrolled through entire homepage (0-8000px), data-testid='video-testimonials' NOT found. Regular 'What Our Clients Say' text testimonials present instead.

fields_verified: Video Testimonial checkbox (id='is_video', gold colored label)
Video URL field with placeholder '(YouTube, Vimeo, or direct)'
Location field with placeholder 'Palm Jumeirah, Dubai'

seed_data_creation: None - existing video testimonials data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video Testimonials feature fully implemented. Component at /app/frontend/components/testimonials/VideoTestimonials.tsx renders on /about page only (not homepage per user requirement). Shows 3 video testimonials with placeholder 'Video Coming Soon' modal since video URLs are intentionally empty. Admin at /admin/testimonials has checkbox and fields for video testimonials (video_url, video_thumbnail, video_duration, location). Backend model at /app/backend/models/content.py has video fields (is_video, video_url, video_thumbnail, video_duration, location).
